meta.notes: Subscriber counts are approximate as of early 2026. ETF relevance scored 1-10 based on content focus.

influencers.name: Graham Stephan
influencers.focus: Real estate investing, personal finance, stock market, ETFs
influencers.sample_content: How I Would Invest $10,000 in 2026 (index funds & ETFs breakdown)
influencers.engagement_note: One of the highest-engagement finance creators; strong millennial/Gen-Z audience, 550M+ total views

influencers.name: Andrei Jikh
influencers.focus: Dividend investing, passive income, ETFs, crypto
influencers.sample_content: The Only ETFs You'll Ever Need (3-fund portfolio deep dive)
influencers.engagement_note: Known for making dividend/ETF investing approachable; strong visual storytelling with card tricks

influencers.name: Mark Tilbury
influencers.sample_content: I Invested $100/Month Into ETFs For 30 Years — Here's What Happened
influencers.engagement_note: Largest subscriber base among finance YouTubers; British entrepreneur mixing practical money lessons with storytelling

influencers.name: Humphrey Yang
influencers.focus: Personal finance explainers, taxes, investing basics
influencers.sample_content: Index Funds vs ETFs — Which One Should You Pick?
influencers.engagement_note: Former financial advisor; excels at breaking complex topics into digestible content; strong TikTok crossover audience

influencers.name: Chelsea Fagan / The Financial Diet
influencers.focus: Personal finance, budgeting, investing for beginners
influencers.sample_content: How To Start Investing With $100 (ETFs, index funds, robo-advisors)
influencers.engagement_note: Strong female-skewing audience; makes money topics approachable and engaging

influencers.name: Marko Zlatic / Whiteboard Finance
influencers.focus: Investing education, real estate, ETFs, entrepreneurship
influencers.sample_content: Best Vanguard ETFs for Long-Term Wealth (VTI vs VOO vs VT)
influencers.engagement_note: Highly actionable content with visual whiteboard explanations; popular for ETF comparisons

influencers.name: Dave Ramsey / The Ramsey Show
influencers.focus: Debt elimination, personal finance, mutual funds/ETFs
influencers.sample_content: Why I Recommend Index Funds Over Individual Stocks
influencers.engagement_note: 18M+ weekly listeners across platforms; enormous mainstream reach but less ETF-specific

influencers.name: Jeremy / Financial Education
influencers.focus: Stock picking, investing education, market analysis
influencers.sample_content: ETF vs Individual Stocks: What Actually Makes More Money?
influencers.engagement_note: 100M+ total views; combines education with real portfolio updates

influencers.name: Ricky Gutierrez
influencers.focus: Stocks, ETFs, penny stocks, crypto, real estate
influencers.sample_content: How to Build a $100K Portfolio with ETFs in Your 20s
influencers.engagement_note: Appeals to younger traders; covers broad range of investment vehicles including ETFs

influencers.name: Passive Income Investing
influencers.focus: Dividend ETFs, covered call ETFs, REITs, income funds
influencers.content_type: ETF reviews, dividend income tracking, portfolio updates
influencers.sample_content: JEPI vs JEPQ vs SCHD: Best Dividend ETF for Passive Income 2026
influencers.engagement_note: Highly ETF-focused niche channel; strong community of income-oriented ETF investors

influencers.name: Joseph Carlson
influencers.focus: Dividend investing, ETF portfolio building, long-term wealth
influencers.content_type: Portfolio updates, ETF analysis, calm educational style
influencers.sample_content: My Entire ETF Portfolio Revealed (and why I hold each one)
influencers.engagement_note: Known for transparent real-money portfolio tracking; loyal community of dividend/ETF enthusiasts

influencers.name: 슈카월드 (Syuka World)
influencers.focus: 경제 전반, 금융 이슈, 투자 트렌드, ETF 포함
influencers.sample_content: 미국 ETF가 한국 투자의 답인 이유 (S&P500 ETF 완벽 분석)
influencers.engagement_note: 한국 최대 경제 유튜브 채널; 연 추정 수익 9억원; 삼프로TV와 합병 논의

influencers.name: 삼프로TV (3ProTV)
influencers.focus: 경제 뉴스, 주식/ETF 분석, 전문가 인터뷰
influencers.content_type: 뉴스 분석, 전문가 대담, 라이브 방송
influencers.sample_content: 2026 ETF 포트폴리오 전략: 전문가 3인이 추천하는 ETF
influencers.engagement_note: 전문가 패널 형식으로 신뢰도 높음; 연 추정 수익 6.9억원; 아침 라이브로 개인투자자 출근 루틴에 정착

influencers.name: 박곰희TV (Park Gomhee TV)
influencers.content_type: ETF 비교, 연금 투자 가이드, 초보 투자자 교육
influencers.engagement_note: '내돈은 내손으로' 슬로건; ETF와 연금 투자에 특화되어 ETF 마케팅 타겟으로 매우 적합

influencers.name: 소수몽키 (Sosu Monkey)
influencers.focus: 미국 배당주, ETF 투자, 직장인 재테크
influencers.content_type: 배당 ETF 분석, 포트폴리오 공개, 실전 투자기
influencers.sample_content: SCHD vs VYM vs HDV 배당 ETF 완전 비교 (직장인 적립식 투자)
influencers.engagement_note: 『잠든 사이 월급 버는 미국 배당주 투자』 저자; 직장인 투자자 공감대 형성에 강점

influencers.name: 머니코믹스 (Money Comics)
influencers.engagement_note: 독특한 만화/일러스트 형식으로 경제 교육; 젊은층 유입에 효과적
